title: Bare Bones Patches
description: Compability with Bare Bones for mods
body:
Bare Bones Patches is made for [Trailer Adventure](https://modrinth.com/modpack/trailer-adventure) Modpack primary, but if you want you can use it too.     
Texture are changed for:
> [Detail Armor Bar](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar)

> [Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)

> [Actual Cherries](https://modrinth.com/mod/actual-cherries)

> [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph)

> [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi)

> [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

> [Snow Real Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/snow-real-magic)

> [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)

> [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

> [Serene Seasons](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)

Project is separate from Ancient Team, but published under it

I also think it's worth playing it with friends, and if you don't have a server here's a code for **10% discount on chunkserve** 

**Code : K8bus**.
